title: The Q1 Revenue Acceleration 90-Day System -- Proposal for Acme Corp

sections.heading: The Q1 Revenue Acceleration 90-Day System
sections.body: A complete conversion optimization and automation system designed to transform your online store into a lead-generating machine within 90 days.

sections.heading: The Problem
sections.body: Your current website converts at 1.2%, well below the 3.5% industry average. Every month, thousands of visitors land on your site and leave without buying. Your team spends 15+ hours per week on manual follow-ups that should be automated. Meanwhile, competitors with half your product quality are outperforming you because their digital systems work while yours leak revenue.

sections.heading: The Dream Outcome
sections.body: A conversion-optimized storefront that turns browsers into buyers at 3x your current rate, backed by automated follow-up sequences that recover abandoned carts and nurture leads while you sleep. Within 90 days: 3.5%+ conversion rate, 40% reduction in manual follow-up time, and a projected $180K in additional annual revenue.

sections.heading: How We Get You There
sections.body: We deploy a 3-phase system that eliminates friction at every stage of your customer journey:

sections.heading: Core Deliverables
bullets: The Conversion Audit Blueprint ($3,000 value) -- Full-funnel analysis of your current site, identifying the exact drop-off points costing you revenue.
Revenue-Optimized Storefront Redesign ($12,000 value) -- Complete redesign of your product pages, checkout flow, and mobile experience built for conversion.
The Automated Follow-Up Engine ($5,000 value) -- Cart abandonment sequences, post-purchase flows, and lead nurture campaigns that run on autopilot.
Performance Command Center ($2,500 value) -- Real-time dashboard tracking conversion rates, revenue attribution, and campaign performance.

sections.heading: Bonuses
bullets: 90-Day Growth Dashboard ($2,000 value) -- Custom analytics dashboard tracking every metric that matters. Yours free because we build it as part of our process anyway.
SEO Quick-Win Package ($1,500 value) -- Technical SEO fixes and content optimization for your top 10 pages. Free because it takes us 2 hours and compounds your results.
60-Day Post-Launch Support ($3,000 value) -- Direct Slack access to our team for 60 days after launch. Free because your success is our best case study.

rows: Conversion audit, competitor analysis, user journey mapping
Wireframes, content strategy, automation flow design
UI/UX design, frontend build, automation setup
A/B testing, iteration based on live data
Everything above + Post-Launch Support + Priority Scheduling

sections.heading: ROI Math
sections.body: Current monthly revenue: ~$150K. A conservative 2x conversion rate improvement means an additional $150K/month in revenue. Even at 1.5x improvement, that's $75K/month in new revenue. The Growth tier ($12K) pays for itself in the first 5 days of improved performance.

sections.heading: Our Guarantee
sections.body:
The Safety Net: If within the first 14 days you feel this isn't the right fit for any reason, we'll refund your investment in full. No questions, no friction.

The Results Promise: If your conversion rate hasn't improved by at least 50% within 90 days of launch, we continue working for free until it does.

sections.heading: Why Now
sections.body: We take on 3 new e-commerce projects per month to maintain quality. We currently have 1 slot available for April. Bonuses are included if we kick off by March 28. This proposal is valid for 7 days.

sections.heading: Next Step
sections.body: Reply with "Let's go" to lock in your April slot, or book a 15-minute scoping call to finalize details. Either way, the next move takes less than 60 seconds.
